name: Pumpkin Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. In a large bowl, combine the pureed pumpkin, apple juice, eggs, honey, pumpkin pie spice, salt, and gluten mixture.
3. Add oat or wheat flakes, whole wheat flour, and yeast to the bowl. Mix well until combined.
4. Fold in the diced dried apples and ground nuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake at medium temperature for the time specified by the manufacturer's instructions.
7. Remove the bread from the oven when it is done (at the beep).
8. Makes 1-1/2 lb loaf.
